name: @architecture/validate-source-imports
description: Validate source-code import boundaries across apps and packages.

readme.summary: Validates that TypeScript/JS source files only import from permitted packages per the architecture import-boundary rules.
responsibilities: Walk apps/ and packages/ source files
Extract static, re-export, and dynamic import specifiers via regex
Enforce universal rules: no deep imports, no test-support in production files
Enforce per-package boundary rules derived from import-boundary-rules.md
Write JSON and Markdown validation reports
nonResponsibilities: Does not perform TypeScript type-checking or compiler integration
Does not validate runtime node_modules resolution
Does not validate relative within-package imports
usage: Run from repository root with node tools/architecture/validate-source-imports/src/index.mjs
Positional arguments are scan root directories relative to --root; defaults to apps packages
operationalNotes: Validation reports are written under reports/validation unless --no-reports is supplied
Self-evidence is written under reports/tooling/validate-source-imports unless --no-reports is supplied
Committed governance evidence is written to docs/evidence/import-boundaries/ with --write
